public void testCriteriaCondition() {
        Criteria criteria = Criteria.builder()
                .where(Filters.gt("age", 18))
                .groupBy("status")
                .having(Filters.gt("COUNT(*)", 5))
                .orderBy("status")
                .limit(10)
                .build();

        String sql = Dsl.PSC.select("status", "COUNT(*)").from("users").append(criteria).build
